title: Metric
description: Implementation of the 'Metric' model. Metrics for subscription

creationDateTime.description: The UTC date and time when the subscription was created.

messagesAttempted.description: The number of event notifications Mindbody attempted to deliver to the subscription `webhookUrl`, including retries.

messagesDelivered.description: The number of event notifications Mindbody successfully delivered to the subscription `webhookUrl`.

messagesFailed.description: The number of event notifications that Mindbody stopped trying to send after 3 hours.

messagesUndelivered.description: The number of event notifications where MINDBODY received a failure response from the subscription `webhookUrl`.

status.description:
The subscription's current status. **Possible Values**:
`PendingActivation` - The subscription is created but not receiving event notifications.To start receiving event notifications, set the subscription’s status to Active using the PATCH Subscription endpoint.
`Active` - The subscription is active and can receive event notifications.
`DeactivatedByUser` - You deactivated the subscription.
`DeactivatedByAdmin` - Mindbody deactivated your subscription.
`DeactivatedT

statusChangeDate.description: The UTC date and time when the subscription `status` was last updated.
